name: GPT-5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna)
summary: Three new frontier models — Terra and Luna land in the API now at $2.50 and $1 per million input tokens, plus a ChatGPT Work agent that runs whole jobs instead of just answering. A cheap tier for shipping agentic apps.

name: Grok 4.5
summary: Cheap frontier coding and agentic model you can use today at $2 per million input tokens, roughly half Opus's price. Wire it in now via Cursor, Grok Build, the xAI API, OpenRouter, and Vercel to ship agentic work on a budget.

name: Gemini Omni Flash
summary: Generate short video clips from a prompt and refine them by chatting — live in public preview via the Gemini API and AI Studio at about $0.10 per second, cheap enough to wire real video generation into your own app today.

name: Muse Image
summary: Generate and edit images free inside Meta AI, WhatsApp, and Instagram Stories — it plans the layout, pulls live web context, and blends multiple reference images. Handy for social posts and quick mockups without a separate design tool.

name: Claude Cowork on web & mobile
summary: Kick off real work from your phone or browser, close the laptop, and Claude keeps going in the cloud — running scheduled and background tasks with no device online, and pinging you only when it needs a decision. Beta rolling out to Max users now.

name: gpt-realtime-2.1
summary: Build low-latency voice agents that listen, reason, and talk back, with tool use and configurable thinking effort. A cheaper distilled mini variant ships alongside, and p95 latency drops at least 25%. Live in the Realtime API today.

name: AI crawler controls
summary: Control which AI bots touch your site — separately allow or block Search, Agent, and Training crawlers instead of one all-or-nothing toggle. Free on every plan, so any solo site owner can decide who gets their content and who pays for it.

name: Kimi K2.7 Code in GitHub Copilot
summary: An open-weight trillion-parameter coding model is now selectable right in the GitHub Copilot picker — the first from a China-based lab. A cheaper alternative for everyday coding, billed at usage rates on Copilot Pro and up.
